text:
(In reply to Tijl Coosemans from comment #42)
Yes, I did -- to revert the earlier patch. 
I also did a build before the revert and after the revert, just to make sure I'm not messing the results.
I also downloaded from SVN a fresh copy of this same revision to see if it is any different from what I have. It's the same.
